overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through Night City's neon-lit downtown district at night. The journey transitions from bright commercial boulevards with towering digital billboards to darker alleyways with food stalls, then through industrial service corridors before returning to the main streets.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit commercial boulevard with towering digital billboards

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wide sidewalk past various pedestrians and street vendors

entered.detail: massive illuminated billboard displaying 'FEEL FREE' in blue neon letters against a dark building facade
tall building with distinctive circular window patterns and metallic exterior
tall modern street lamp with multiple light fixtures illuminating the sidewalk
silver sedan parked along the curb of the street

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a wide commercial boulevard at night, surrounded by towering digital billboards and neon signage. The street is moderately busy with pedestrians walking in the same direction, and a few cars pass by on the road to the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered market alley with food stalls and overhead walkways

events.description: turns right from the bright main street into a darker alleyway with overhead pedestrian bridges

agents.ego_description: navigating through a narrow alley past food vendors and pedestrians milling about the stalls

notable_agents.action: vendor standing behind a food stall with glowing menu displays

entered.detail: wooden food stall with extended canopy and warm interior lighting
metal pedestrian bridge connecting buildings above the alley
green neon arrow sign pointing down the alley direction
concrete wall covered in colorful spray paint and street art

segments.scene_description: The character turns into a narrow, enclosed alleyway sheltered from the open sky by overhead walkways. The lighting shifts to warmer artificial sources from food stalls, and the ground changes to rougher paved tiles. Pedestrians walk in opposing directions through the confined space.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial service corridor with concrete staircases and utility areas

events.description: turns left into a dimly lit industrial back area with concrete walls and service staircases
passes under a bright green industrial overhead light creating harsh shadows on the concrete

agents.ego_description: walking through a dimly lit service corridor with scattered debris and minimal pedestrian traffic

notable_agents.action: person sitting on concrete stairs leading to an upper level

entered.detail: wide concrete staircase with metal railings leading up to building entrances
harsh green fluorescent light fixture mounted on the overhead structure
chain-link metal gate blocking off a service area
large structural concrete pillar supporting the overhead walkway

segments.scene_description: The character navigates through an industrial service corridor with exposed concrete structures and minimal lighting. The environment feels utilitarian with staircases, utility boxes, and metal fencing. Fewer pedestrians are present in this back area compared to the main streets.

scene_state.functional_zone: major intersection with towering digital advertisements and crosswalks

events.description: exits the industrial alley back onto the main commercial street with bright neon signage and wide roads
waits at the crosswalk then crosses the wide street with other pedestrians while vehicles pass by

agents.ego_description: crossing the wide intersection while observing the towering billboards and navigating around passing vehicles

notable_agents.action: black car driving through the intersection, stopping for pedestrians

entered.detail: massive vertical digital screen displaying advertisements high above the street
yellow and white striped pedestrian crossing markings on the asphalt
large building facade with circular ventilation structures and multiple digital screens
small booth with stacked newspapers and magazines on the sidewalk corner

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the alley, the character returns to the bright neon-lit main street and crosses a wide intersection. Towering digital billboards illuminate the scene from all sides while vehicles navigate the road and pedestrians cross in groups.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk with neon storefronts including pawn shops and retail

agents.ego_description: continuing along the sidewalk past illuminated storefronts and scattered pedestrians

entered.detail: green neon sign reading 'PAWN SHOP' above a storefront entrance
storefront with bright pink neon lighting and large window displays
orange and black metal railing separating the sidewalk from the street

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a quieter section of the downtown sidewalk, passing by a pawn shop with green neon signage and other storefronts with pink neon lighting. The street has fewer pedestrians and parked cars along the curb, with barriers separating the walkway from the road.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey through a neon-lit metropolis that transitions from bright commercial boulevards into secluded industrial corridors before returning to the vibrant city streets. It begins on a wide boulevard surrounded by towering digital billboards and passing traffic, moving steadily forward amidst a crowd of pedestrians. As the character turns away from the main road, the scene shifts into a narrow, enclosed alleyway where overhead walkways block the sky and warm light spills from crowded food stalls. The camera then pushes deeper into a utilitarian service corridor of exposed concrete and metal fencing with minimal lighting, before finally emerging back into the blinding glow of a wide intersection filled with massive screens and crossing crowds. The movement concludes along a quieter stretch of sidewalk, passing by the distinct green and pink neon signage of storefronts and pawn shops.
